input.title: Input
input.description: The input for the task run

output.title: Output
output.description: The output for the task run

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags to apply to the task run

path.title: Path
path.description: File system path where the record is stored.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when the model was created. Timezone-aware; stores the writer's local offset.

type.title: TaskOutputRatingType
type.description: Defines the types of rating systems available for task outputs.

value.title: Value
value.description:
The rating value. Interpretation depends on rating type:
- five_star: 1-5 stars
- pass_fail: 1.0 (pass) or 0.0 (fail)
- pass_fail_critical: 1.0 (pass), 0.0 (fail), or -1.0 (critical fail)

value.title: Value
value.description: The rating value. Interpretation depends on rating type

type.title: TaskOutputRatingType
type.description: Defines the types of rating systems available for task outputs.

additionalProperties.title: RequirementRating
additionalProperties.description: Rating for a specific requirement within a task output.

requirement_ratings.title: Requirement Ratings
requirement_ratings.description: The ratings of the requirements of the task. The ID can be either a task_requirement_id or a named rating for an eval_output_score name (in format 'named::<name>').

anyOf.title: TaskOutputRating
anyOf.description:
A rating for a task output, including an overall rating and ratings for each requirement.

Supports:
- five_star: 1-5 star ratings
- pass_fail: boolean pass/fail (1.0 = pass, 0.0 = fail)
- pass_fail_critical: tri-state (1.0 = pass, 0.0 = fail, -1.0 = critical fail)

model_name.title: Model Name
model_name.description: The name of the model used to generate the data

model_provider.title: Model Provider
model_provider.description: The provider of the model used to generate the data

adapter_name.title: Adapter Name
adapter_name.description: The name of the adapter used to generate the data

schema.title: CreateTaskRunRequest
schema.description: Request model for creating a synthetic TaskRun directly (without running a model).

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project.
project_id.title: Project Id

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task within the project.
task_id.title: Task Id
